title: Clone Wars (disambiguation)
content:
'''Clone Wars''' may refer to any of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Clone Wars]]''', a [[The galaxy|galaxy]]-wide conflict that occurred between [[22 BBY]] and [[19 BBY]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]''', a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict that occurred between [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]
*'''[[The Clone Wars (holofilm)|''The Clone Wars'']]''', a holofilm on the story of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the conflict

==Real world==
===''Clone Wars'' (2002–2007)===
*'''[[Clone Wars multimedia project]]'''
**'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a [[2002]] video game released on [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|GameCube]], [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]], and [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]]
**'''''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''''', a [[2003]]–[[2005]] animated television series directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]]
***'''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]]''', a [[2008]] [[PhotoComic]] adaptation of the television series
**'''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars (toy line)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'']]''', a 2003–2005 collection of action figures
*'''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']]''', a [[2004]]–[[2007]] series of digest-size comics based on the style of the ''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' animated series
*'''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'']]''', a nine-part trade-paperback series collecting issues from the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' and [[Star Wars: Jedi (one-shots)|''Star Wars: Jedi'']] comic series

===''The Clone Wars'' (2008–2020){{Anchor|TCW}}===
*'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (multimedia project)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' (multimedia project)]]'''
**'''''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''''', a CGI animated television series airing on [[Cartoon Network]] from 2008 to [[2013]], on [[Netflix]] in [[2014]], then on [[Disney+]] in [[2020]]
**'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a 2008 CGI animated film leading into the TV series
***[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (novelization)|'''''Star Wars: The Clone Wars''''']], the novelization of the film
***'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (junior novelization)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', the junior novelization of the film
***'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (soundtrack)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', [[Kevin Kiner]]'s score for the film
**'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (webcomics)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a series of webcomics on [[StarWars.com]] directly tying into the TV series' first three seasons
***'''''[[Star Wars: Tales from The Clone Wars Webcomic Collection Season 1|Star Wars: Tales from the Clone Wars]]''''', a trade paperback collection of all the "[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (webcomics)#Season One|Season One]]" and [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (webcomics)#Hunting the Hunters|''Hunting the Hunters'']] webcomics
**'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (toy line)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a collection of action figures based on the film and TV series
**'''''[[The Clone Wars Legacy]]''''', a multimedia project comprising comics, novels, and unfinished TV episodes.

====Books and publications====
*'''[[:Category:The Clone Wars reference books|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' reference books]]''', various guide books based on the film and TV series
*'''[[:Category:The Clone Wars young readers|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' young readers]]''', a series of young readers' books based on the film and TV series

====Comic books and magazines====
*'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (comic series)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a 2008–2010 comic series based on the TV series
*'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (graphic novellas)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a comic digest based on the TV series
*'''[[Star Wars Comic|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' Comic]]''', Volumes 5 and 6 of [[Titan Magazines]]'s [[Star Wars Comic|''Star Wars'' Comic]]
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine]]''''', a US reprint of the above UK magazine

====Games and other multimedia====
*'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (mobile)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a 2008 mobile strategy/action game
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Jedi Alliance]]''''', a 2008 video game for the Nintendo DS
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Lightsaber Duels]]''''', a 2008 video game for the Nintendo Wii
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (Leapfrog)|'''''Star Wars: The Clone Wars''''']], a 2009 video game for the LeapFrog Diji
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes]]''''', a 2009 multi-platform video game
*'''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']]''', a kid-targeted [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] released in 2010 by [[Sony|Sony Online Entertainment]]
*'''''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars]]''''', a 2010 video game
*"'''[[The Clone Wars (reference book)|The Clone Wars]]'''," an issue of the [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']]
*'''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (board game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]''', a board game
